results.title: Warsh’s gamble: A quieter Federal Reserve could mean volatile markets, higher rates
results.description: Warsh thinks the financial markets have become too dependent on Fed guidance.

results.title: Letter: Supporting a better grid
results.description: A better electrical grid would solve lots of problems: blackouts, high prices, power-starved data centers, wildfire ignition and even some national security issues. But the difficulty of getting permits stands in the way of a better grid.

results.title: Apple Inc. $AAPL is Financial Avengers Inc.’s 4th Largest Position
results.description: Financial Avengers Inc. reduced its stake in Apple Inc. (NASDAQ:AAPL – Free Report) by 2.5% during the fourth quarter, according to the company in its most recent 13F filing with the SEC. The fund owned 89,442 shares of the iPhone maker’s stock after selling 2,309 shares during the period. Apple makes up 10.0% of Financial [...]

results.title: Magna Mining Intersects 29.7% Copper Equivalent over 3.4 metres, consisting of 9.4% Copper, 2.3% Nickel, 19.8 g/t Gold and 8.8 g/t Platinum + Palladium within the R2 Footwall Zone at the Levack Mine in Sudbury, Ontario
results.description: SUDBURY, Ontario, June 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Magna Mining Inc. (TSXV: NICU) (OTCQX: MGMNF) (FSE: 8YD) (“Magna” or the “Company”) is pleased to provide the results of ongoing exploration and an update on activities at the past-producing Levack Mine, located in the North Range of the Sudbury Basin, Ontario, Canada (Figure 1). Recent drilling has continued to intersect significant copper-rich massive sulphide veins with high grade precious metals within the R2 Footwall Zone. Highlights of two additional wedge holes from surface and the first underground drill hole targeting the R2 Footwall Zone are summarized below and in Table 1. Exploration of the R2 Footwall Zone continues in parallel with underground development and surface work at Levack Mine in anticipation of a restart decision in the second half of 2026 following completion of the Levack Preliminary Economic Assessment (“PEA”) in Q3.

results.title: 24bn record breach puts SMEs at greatest risk
results.description: Small businesses relying on Google or Microsoft credentials to access multiple platforms face the biggest exposure from a massive data breach.

results.title: Muhammad Ikmal Opat steps down from Widad
results.description: PETALING JAYA: Tan Sri Muhammad Ikmal Opat Abdullah, the single-largest shareholder of Widad Group Bhd, has resigned as the group's executive deputy chairman.
